description.value:
• Starting at 3rd level, you tap into the lattent power of your heritage, making you a look more akin to an beast. You may enter this form as a action, twice per long rest, for up to a minute. You can use this transformation an additional time per long rest at 11th and 18th levels. For its duration you gain the following benefits;

  • Your AC increases by +1 while you are not wearing heavy armor. This increases by +2 at 11th level.

  • Your speed increases by 5ft. This increases to 10ft at 7th level and to 15ft 11th level.

  • You gain an ammount of damage reduction equal to your strength or dexterity modifier (your choice when you transform). At 11th level you add your constitution modifier to the total.

  • Your unarmed damage die increases one step.

  • You double the weight you can push, drag, carry or lift and can grapple or shove a creature two size larger than you.

  • You may dash as a bonus action. While dashing creatures have disavantage on attacks of opportunity against you until the start of your next turn.

  • Starting at 7th level, at the start of your turn you roll Xd4 + your Constitution Modifier, where X is equal to your proficiency bonus and gain that much hp. At 11th level the dice become d6's and d10's at 15th level. If you start your turn unconscious you do not gain the hitpoints.

  • At 11th level, whenever you would be critically hit, you can treat it as a normal hit. This may occur three times per long rest.

At 11th level as part of rolling initiative you may transform immediately as a part of your initiative roll. You do not gain this benefit while surprised.
